claims.summary: Telemetry and sensory wire contracts should be canonical rather than mirrored stringly typed structs.
claims.disposition: verify astrid-minime-protocol DTOs, fixtures, exact pin, and port conversions

claims.summary: Observed telemetry, bridge-derived texture evidence, and Astrid interpretation must remain separate ownership domains.
claims.disposition: verify provenance wrappers, one-pass decode, parent-chain tests, and witness distinction rendering

claims.summary: A missing damping candidate must remain unknown and observable rather than defaulting to an active value.
Evidence artifacts must not become executable authority through deserialization or legacy booleans.
claims.disposition: verify private-constructor authority wrappers, compile-fail tests, and centralized ArtifactAuthorityStateV1 projection
